182 
Supreme Court Reports
“The Asst. Estate Manager (Gr.I) 
New Mangalore Port Trust, 
Mangalore,
Sir,
Subject: Writ Petition No.36972/2011, order 
dated 28.06.2013 of Hon’ble High Court of 
Karnataka
Ref: i) Payment of difference licence fee on 
account of revision of scale of rates w.e.f. 
20.02.2007, on the basis of Tamp order No. 
G184, dated: 23.07.2010.
ii) Your Letter bearing No.3/44/2015/EBL.1/
TAMP, dated 15.01.2015.
With reference to the above said subject, we 
would like to inform you that we had challenged 
the TAMP order dated: 23.07.2010, before the 
Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka, Bangalore by 
filing the writ petition No.34541 & 34784/211 
and the said writ petition was dismissed on 
28.06.2013 by the Hon’ble High Court of 
Karnataka, Bangalore. We have challenged
